notes: The French course more than doubles, from 108 to 250 lessons: 45 at A1, 55 at A2, 70 at B1 and 80 at B2. The new lessons fill the real gaps, possessives and pronominal verbs at A1, full negation and everyday transactions at A2, cause, consequence, concession and the job hunt at B1, and register, argumentation and society topics at B2. Placement now lands you at the matching point of the longer course.
